analysis.fullMapNote: session-authored atlas (Model B) via parallel finders + per-finding adversarial verification + a hand re-verify pass that dropped finder over-flags (e.g. the thin-but-propagating service writes). Where the static gates are near-silent, the atlas recovered a coherent Firestore error-handling-gap theme the gates cannot express: onSnapshot error callbacks that log without propagating (classService:78, stationService:59/80), a dashboard load showing empty-vs-failed indistinguishably (DashboardPage:60), a fire-and-forget delete and a false-success copy toast (ActionsCell:82/:51), a non-atomic deleteClass cascade (classService:93), and a -1-on-empty index clamp (courseHelpers:78). Roadmap units src-services(4)/src-components(3)/src-pages(1)/src-utils(1); classify deferred to HITL
